name: Block, Inc.
analysis: XYZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$105.7400, stop A$93.6441, target A$142.0277 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
